title: Knarfy's Dumb Food Ideas 3
description: A collection of viewer-submitted food ideas thrown together for Thanksgiving!
body:
# Knarfy's Terrible Food Ideas (3)
**Happy Thanksgiving! Terrible foods is back for a THIRD YEAR! This mod is designed to be PURE CHAOS. This adds 46 food items (or related items) for your worst Thanksgiving dinner ever.**

> ⚠️ **WARNING:** This mod includes some very cursed and wild player animations that sometimes crash in multiplayer. You can use the `END` key on your keyboard (remappable) to reset your player animations, but the server may require a restart if you are using this on one. **PLAY AT YOUR OWN RISK**

This mod is Inspired by YouTube comments and developed by Knarfy for a video on Knarfy's channel!\
Check out the original video here for more info: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/drvYXeZAU5M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Here are the Terrible Foods (and related features) included in this mod:
- Drinkable Air
- Yellow Snow Patches in the world
  - Yellow snow ball and block
- Edible Fundy & Knarfy
  - Only obtainable in Creative, or by right clicking on the actual Knarfy or Fundy
- McDonald's Counter
- McDonald's Employee
- Insane Burger with a really long name
  - Meat Sweats Effect
  - Heartburn Effect
  - Greasy Fingers Effect
  - Revenge of the Cows Effect
- Rubik's Cube
- Mario Mushroom
- Edible Nails
- Plates (also edible)
- Luck Fish (Obtainable from Fishing)
- The Doovid Meal (Apple Juice, Milk, Uncrustables, EpiPens, and EpiPens dipped in Milk
  - Walmart Counter
  - Walmart Employee
  - Money (Craftable)
- Bucket of KFZ (Gives you SystemZee's Mustache
- Enchanted Golden Pumpkin Pie
- Silica Gel Packet (Dehydrates you)
- Hot Potato (FIRE)
- Warheads (Assorted Flavors)
- Doctor's Clothes (Apples will kill you now)
- Bowl of Soggy Ketchup (ew)
- Quantum Burger (Teleports you really far away)
- Innocent Bagels
  - Drops from Villagers
  - Re-awakens the Villagers you killed when you eat it
- Redbull (at least it gives you wings...)
- 26 New Advancements

Use `/getfoodchest` to get a chest full of assorted food items (Operator Only)\
Use `/setfoodchest [x] [y] [z]` to set a food chest at a location\
Use `/course [1-3]` to get the corresponding shulker box with that course's items\
Also includes the gamerule `knarfyAndFundyAreFood`

> ⚠️ **Remember,** **THIS MOD HAS A LOT OF VISUAL BUGS AND WEIRD BUGS!!** It is intentionally designed to be used for Knarfy's video and NOTHING ELSE. Use on your own worlds at your own risk! This mod will not be maintained.
